description: Implement FGAP-143: extend the citation-rot scanner's error-message matcher to also match a CallExpression whose callee is the super keyword when the enclosing class extends an Error-suffixed base (conservatively: any base), scanning its first string-literal argument exactly as the NewExpression arm does; add a scanner test fixture pinning the super(...) construction form. In the same pass, audit the matcher for other unmatched construction forms of the same operator-facing-error-text surface (e.g. message assignment via this.message = ...) and cover or explicitly document each.
acceptance_criteria: A test fixture with a tracker-ID citation inside an Error subclass's super(...) message is flagged by the scanner with the error-message surface kind
The existing NewExpression error-message detection unchanged (regression)
The construction-form audit's findings are covered by matcher arms or documented as deliberate exclusions in the module header -- no silent holes
build, check, and full test suite exit 0
